product_name: True Guy - Sea Island Selvedge - Indigo
description_html:
The Sea Island Selvedge is a 12oz Japanese selvedge denim crafted from Virgin American Sea Island Cotton—the most luxurious denim we’ve ever produced. Sea Island Cotton is an ultra-rare Extra-Long Staple cotton. Renowned for its silky luster, uniform texture, cashmere-like softness, and exceptional durability, this cotton has a rich and storied past. Originally cultivated in the West Indies in the 1600s, it was once so coveted that British royalty tried to keep it exclusive. In the 1800s, seeds made their way to the American colonies, but a devastating beetle infestation nearly wiped it out in the 1920s.

Fast forward to 2015…. seeds that were tucked away in a seed vault are plated in Texas and New Mexico. This American-grown strain, genetically identical to the original variety, is now being used by select Japanese mills, including ours. Inspired by 1920s-era denim, this fabric offers a glimpse into an alternate history. What if Sea Island Cotton had become the standard? Imagine a world where silky-soft, ultra-durable jeans was the norm! Finishing details include contrast stitching, a durable paper patch, antique copper hardware, and a pink selvedge ID.

The True Guy is a straight leg fit with a medium rise along with extra room in the seat and thigh that falls straight from knee to hem.

  • Sea Island Selvedge - Indigo
  • STYLE / FIT — True Guy
  • 12oz Japanese Selvedge Denim
  • 100% Cotton
  • Button Fly
  • Made in Canada
  • SKU — 101132821

product_name: True Guy - Texas Chainsaw Massacre "Leatherface" Selvedge - Indigo
description_html:
The Leatherface Selvedge is our Halloween release, built around one of the most legendary horror films of all time: The Texas Chain Saw Massacre (1974). Grainy, brutal, and stripped of polish, the movie still feels dangerous, like something that wasn’t supposed to make it to theaters. Its tension comes from what it withholds: there’s little blood, no music, and almost no dialogue from the killer. Just heat, noise, and panic.

This fabric is made with 100% Texas-grown cotton, It’s spun into a 14.5oz rope-dyed indigo selvedge denim with a pale yellow weft, echoing Leatherface’s worn butcher’s apron. The color isn’t bright or clean, it’s the muted, washed-out yellow you see in aged canvas under harsh light.

The selvedge ID is finished in silver and red, nodding to the chrome of the chainsaw and the violence it leaves behind. The fabric is woven in Japan on shuttle looms, giving it a rigid hand and vertical texture that will evolve with wear and fade with time.

Each pair includes a natural vegetable-tanned leather patch, embossed and foil-stamped with officially licensed Leatherface artwork. The pocket bags are fully printed in color with film stills from the original 1974 release. And the co-branded woven label pulls from an actual newspaper ad used to promote the movie’s theatrical run.

Every element was designed to feel true to the film.

The True Guy is a straight leg fit with a regular rise along with extra room in the seat and thigh that falls straight from knee to hem.

  • Texas Chainsaw Massacre "Leatherface" Selvedge - Indigo
  • STYLE / FIT — True Guy
  • 14.5oz Japanese Selvedge
  • 100% Cotton
  • Button Fly
  • Made in Canada
  • SKU — TCM144021

product_name: Heritage Denim Jacket - MIJ12 - Aomidori Selvedge
description_html:
Introducing the Aomidori Selvedge, the 12th edition in the Naked & Famous Denim Made in Japan collection. Deriving its name from the Japanese "Aomidori," meaning blue-green, this denim offers a stunning visual twist. At first glance, it resembles traditional indigo denim, yet it uniquely fades to a captivating greenish hue, thanks to an innovative dye technique.

There are two primary methods to achieve greencast denim: top dye and bottom dye. The top dye method involves adding a green tint after the indigo, giving the denim an initial green appearance. Conversely, the bottom dye technique, used for the Aomidori Selvedge, applies a green tint before the indigo rope dye process. This unique approach allows the denim to gradually reveal its greenish hue as it fades, setting it apart in both style and wear pattern.

Crafted with a robust 16oz weight, the denim is woven on vintage shuttle looms in Okayama, Japan. It remains unsanforized to retain its purest form, free from mechanical shrinkage processes, anti-skewing, or singeing. This preservation enhances the fabric’s texture, characterized by its pronounced vertical streakiness and the irregular sizes of its bumpy yarns, which fade at slightly different rates, adding depth and character to each pair.

To maintain its raw, textured appeal, the Aomidori Selvedge undergoes a tempi treatment. This process carefully shrinks the fabric while preserving its distinct characteristics, ensuring you can select your ideal fit from the start.

The jacket also boast a variety of expert finishing touches that contribute to its unique character: 100% iron buttons that develop a rust and patina, copper rivets that naturally oxidize, a premium sheepskin leather patch featuring the "Flower of Carnage" logo, and a selvedge placket. Additionally, a maple leaf embroidered on the front pocket adds a signature touch, encapsulating the heritage of the MIJ series.

Every element of the Aomidori Selvedge is meticulously crafted in Japan, showcasing the exceptional skill and attention to detail that goes into every step of the production process—from the dyeing of the yarns and the weaving of the fabric to the cutting and sewing of the final garment.

The Heritage Jacket pays homage to old type denim jackets capturing the essence of vintage style.  It features a pleated front, flap chest pockets and adjustable rear buttons to ensure the perfect fit. 

  • MIJ12 - Aomidori Selvedge
  • STYLE / FIT — Heritage Denim Jacket
  • 16oz Japanese Selvedge Denim
  • 100% Cotton
  • Button Fly
  • Rinse-washed, Tempi-treated
  • Made in Japan
  • SKU — 160056660

product_name: Heritage Denim Jacket - MIJ13 - Okayama Spirit Kuro
description_html:
Presenting the 'Okayama Spirit Kuro," the 13th edition of the Naked & Famous Denim Made in Japan (MIJ) collection. Taking inspiration from the original Okayama Spirit denim, this striking all-black silhouette is a seamless transformation - with "Kuro" meaning black in Japanese.

Crafted from 16oz unsanforized slubby Japanese selvedge denim, the Okayama Spirit Kuro showcases a unique, uneven texture. The sulfur-dyed cotton yarns create an irregular tone, as the thicker sections absorb more dye while the thinner sections absorb less. When worn over time shades of black will fade to grey, creating an aesthetically pleasing uneven tone that gracefully fades at different rates, attributing to the unique look of this denim.  Enhanced by the slow weaving on vintage shuttle looms, the wavy weave pattern contributes to the denim's organic, uneven grain - a signature of the Okayama Spirit's iconic textured appearance.

The Okayama Spirit Kuro Black undergoes a tempi treatment to preserve its hairiness, grittiness, and raw denim feel. This process shrinks the fabric while maintaining its texture, ensuring you can select the perfect size from the start. The Okayama Spirit Kuro also boasts a host of finishing touches that enhance its character, including blacked-out iron capped buttons that rust, a black deerskin leather patch with the "Flower of Carnage" logo, a selvedge placket. A maple leaf embroidered on the chest pocket is a signature touch of the MIJ series.  

Every aspect of the Okayama Spirit Kuro is meticulously crafted in Japan, guaranteeing its superior quality. The expert craftsmanship behind each pair is evident in the intricate details and care taken throughout the entire production process, from dyeing the yarn and weaving the fabric to cutting and sewing the denim.

The Heritage Jacket pays homage to old type denim jackets capturing the essence of vintage style.  It features a pleated front, flap chest pockets and adjustable rear buttons to ensure the perfect fit.

  • STYLE / FIT — Heritage Denim Jacket
  • 16oz Japanese Selvedge Denim
  • 100% Cotton

  • Rinse-washed, Tempi-treated

product_name: Stacked Guy - Blue Comfort Stretch Selvedge
description_html:
The Blue Comfort Stretch Selvedge is a 14oz Japanese selvedge denim, engineered to prioritize flex, motion, and comfort. This fabric integrates stretch fibers within the weft, facilitating exceptional horizontal movement. Meanwhile, the exterior warp yarns, rope-dyed in rich indigo, are crafted from 100% cotton and are designed to age and fade like traditional raw denim. This denim represents a pioneering achievement, as it combines high-power stretch performance with shuttle loomed heavier weight denim —a first of its kind innovation. The jeans have been rinse-washed to activate the stretch, ensuring instant comfort from the first wear. Other details you’ll find include: a traditional redline selvedge ID, contrast stitching, a brown raging bull leather patch, and silver metallic rivets and buttons.

The Stacked Guy is a tight tapered fit; high rise with a drop crotch, tight from the waist to hem with a slim leg opening.

  • STYLE / FIT — Stacked Guy
  • 14oz Japanese Denim
  • 90% Cotton, 10% Elastane
  • Zipper Fly
  • Made in Canada
  • SKU — 101123605

product_name: Easy Guy - Chinese New Year - Year Of The Snake
description_html:
Celebrate the Year of the Snake with our 12.5oz Japanese selvedge denim, the latest in our series honoring the Chinese Zodiac for the lunar new year. This fabric is crafted using short slub yarn. While the texture isn’t overly pronounced, these short slubs become more apparent as the denim fades, emphasizing distinctive vertical fade patterns. Made from 100% cotton, this raw denim offers a comfortable fit from the start, requiring very minimal break-in time. The selvedge ID proudly displays the traditional Chinese New Year colors of red and gold. The natural veg-tanned leather patch and pocket flasher are the work of Andy Belanger, a talented comic book artist based in the Montreal area. With time, the leather patch will develop a rich patina, evolving alongside the denim to enhance its beauty. Adding a cultural touch, the jeans feature red pocket bags, a nod to the traditional red pocket that symbolizes good fortune and prosperity for the year ahead. Proudly crafted in our Canadian factory, these jeans feature contrast stitching, a button fly, and silver metallic hardware. 

The Easy Guy is a relaxed tapered fit; regular rise, fuller in the seat and thigh with a sharp taper from knee to hem.

  • STYLE / FIT — Easy Guy
  • 12.5oz Japanese Selvedge Denim
  • 100% Cotton
  • Button Fly
  • Made in Canada

product_name: Super Guy - Deadstock Real Gold Selvedge
description_html:
The Real Gold Selvedge is a 12.5oz Japanese Selvedge Denim made with cotton and just a hint of real gold, giving the selvedge ID a golden shine! The denim itself features a classic rigid raw denim look and feel, made with short slub yarns that add depth to the fabric. As the denim fades, these short slub yarns create vertical highlights throughout. This gold detail is prominently featured on the exposed selvedge coin pocket and the selvedge outseam when you flip up your cuff. product_name: Weird Guy -  Brown Fox Selvedge - Brown
description_html:
Introducing the Brown Fox Selvedge, a 13oz Japanese selvedge denim made entirely from organic FoxFibre® cotton—grown in California by cotton breeder and environmental pioneer Sally Fox. This denim contains no dyes or bleach. The brown color comes directly from the cotton plant itself.

Sally Fox began her work in the 1980s, selectively breeding heirloom brown cotton varieties with white Pima to create long-staple, naturally pigmented cotton that could be commercially spun. Her work eliminated the need for chemical dyes, significantly reducing the environmental impact of textile production. The FoxFibre® used in this denim is grown using regenerative organic farming methods, making it one of the most sustainable cotton sources available.

The denim is woven in Okayama, Japan, and spun in Osaka, using undyed natural warp yarns and naturally brown weft yarns. The result is a warm, earthy-toned fabric with subtle surface variation and a soft hand. Over time, the fabric darkens and develops a rich patina with wear and washing.

The Weird Guy is a standard tapered fit with a medium rise, a comfortable top block, and a taper from knee to hem.

FoxFibre® Colorganic® is a registered trademark of Sally Fox.

  • STYLE / FIT — Weird Guy
  • 13oz Japanese Selvedge
  • 100% Organic FoxFibre® Cotton

description_html:
The Giant Hornet Selvedge draws inspiration from the Japanese giant hornet, a fearsome predator known for its size, aggression, and unmistakable yellow-and-black markings. We wanted a denim that captured that same raw intensity.

Crafted from 16oz Japanese Selvedge denim, the Giant Hornet Selvedge features a gritty, short-slub texture produced through low-tension weaving and the use of irregular yarns that create a rugged, uneven surface. Rope-dyed in deep indigo, the warp carries a subtle greenish cast that lends the fabric an “insect-like” tone. As the denim fades, this cast reveals a wide spectrum of high-contrast blue tones that emphasize the texture and depth of the fabric.

Finishing details include contrast stitching, a yellow hair-on leather patch, silver metallic hardware, and a distinctive yellow and black selvedge ID that ties the entire theme together.

description_html:
The Frankenstein Denim is a 14oz Japanese denim, intricately woven in an alternating twill pattern. True to its name, this denim is a mishmash of various construction details. The weave pattern alternates every 2 inches between left-hand twill and right-hand twill throughout the fabric. Since this denim does not adhere to a single twill direction, it cannot undergo anti-skewing, a traditional finishing process designed to eliminate the natural twist of the fabric. Consequently, the sections of left-hand and right-hand twill will twist along their bias over time, enhancing the fabric’s dynamic texture. Crafted with big slub yarns that alternate between thick and thin sections, this denim not only offers an incredible texture but also affects dye penetration during the rope dyeing process. This results in sections of the yarn fading at different rates, revealing a stunning spectrum of indigo hues as the denim ages. Made from 100% cotton, this denim offers a classic rigid raw denim feel. The jeans feature an upside-down leather patch—a distinctive hallmark found only in the Frankenstein Denim series. Proudly crafted in our Canadian factory, these jeans feature contrast stitching, a button fly, and silver metallic hardware. 

The Super Guy is a skinny fit with a medium rise, a slim top block, and a taper from knee to hem.

  • Revival Frankenstein Denim
  • STYLE / FIT — Super Guy
  • 14oz Japanese Denim
  • 100% Cotton
  • Button Fly
  • Made in Canada
  • SKU — 101128100

product_name: Easy Guy - MIJ7 - Yahan Midnight Selvedge
description_html:
The MIJ7, Yahan Midnight Selvedge is an unsanforized 17oz slubby Japanese selvedge denim dyed to such a deep shade of indigo that it appears black. Indigo rope dyeing is a delicate process of running cotton yarns through two story dye vats quickly enough that the dye cannot penetrate the core of the yarn. Then the yarn dries and is dipped again, dries and is dipped again. The yarns are dipped dozens of times to achieve that raw denim shade. But here, with just a little black dye added, these yarns have been dyed over and over so many times that they appear black. With wear and age, the opposite process occurs. Each layer of indigo chips away revealing dark blues, then medium bright blues, then light blues, then finally the white core of the yarn. This fabric is made to celebrate the full spectrum of variegated indigo shades. The yarns themselves are irregular, slubby, and woven loosely giving the fabric an organic, uneven grain. The denim is unsanforized but tempi treated, which shrinks the fabric but protects the hairiness, grittiness, and raw denim feel. The MIJ7 builds in the unparalleled detailing of the Made in Japan collection: black iron buttons that will rust, copper rivets that will oxidize, raised belt loops that will fade, a Japanese sheepskin leather patch with the ¢‚¬œFlower of Carnage¢‚¬� logo, the MIJ maple leaf embroidered onto the back pocket, micro busted outseam, and a selvedge button fly. Dyed, woven, cut, sewn, built in Japan. The Easy Guy is a high-rise tapered fit with a relaxed top block and a sharp taper from knee to hem.  

  • MIJ7 - Yahan Midnight Selvedge
  • STYLE / FIT — Easy Guy
  • 17oz Japanese Selvedge Denim

  • SKU — 101567706

product_name: Pullover Crewneck - Iron Mordant FoxFibre® Double Heavyweight French Terry
description_html:
The Iron Mordant Foxfibre® Double Heavyweight French Terry - Coyote 80 is one of the heaviest knits available today, boasting an impressive 825 GSM (24.3oz per square yard). Its deep, earthy brown hue isn't the result of traditional dyeing but rather a natural blend of Foxfibre® cotton and an iron mordant treatment, creating a rich, organic tone that deepens over time.

Foxfibre® is a naturally colored cotton, organically gown on a single-origin farm in New Mexico, eliminating the need for artificial dyes.

Our Coyote 80 blend showcases the deepest and richest shades in the FoxFibre® range, blending 80% FoxFibre® with 20% organically grown Extra Long Staple cotton. This combination enhances the material's softness and durability.

To further enrich the fabric's tone, the cotton fibers undergo an iron mordant treatment—a traditional process where fibers are soaked in an iron-rich solution that reacts with the cotton's natural pigments. This process intensifies and darkens the fabric's color, transforming it into a deep, earthy brown with rich dimension and character. Over time, Foxfibre® cotton continues to develop and evolve in color, gradually enhancing its depth for a truly one-of-a-kind aging process.

Produced in Wakayama, Japan, using circular knitting machines, this French terry fabric is characterized by its low gauge (10G) knit, and irregular surface texture that's complemented by large, soft loops on the interior, enhancing both comfort and aesthetic appeal. 

Our Pullover Crewneck features a modern athletic fit, highlighted by a ribbed binder collar that features a vintage-style inlaid V gusset. Its raglan sleeves, ribbed side panels, cuffs, and hem offer optimal support and comfort, while the flat seam construction provides a polished finish. Expertly crafted in Japan ensuring superior quality.

  • Iron Mordant FoxFibre® Double Heavyweight French Terry
  • STYLE / FIT — Pullover Crewneck
  • 825gsm / 24.3oz per square yard
  • 100% Cotton
  • Japanese Fabric
  • Made in Japan
